context.summary: Select independent redacted-real operational traces that are not all the same failure mode. Proposed traces are current-session operational traces with visible event ordering, tool/action evidence, contradiction or correction, recovery behavior, environment dependency, and enough lineage for visible-only versus full-lineage replay.

task: Assess candidate selection risk for Proof 014 independent real-trace replication. Candidate traces are malformed consult recovery, occupied MCP port with required checkout verification, and safe-negated claim-boundary audit repair. Enforce no global superiority claims, no AGI claims, no consciousness claims, no black-box-solved claims, and no target-system defect claim.
